overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hitman 3 showing Agent 47 navigating an upscale Japanese-themed exhibition space and lounge. The character moves through various interconnected indoor environments including a bamboo garden lounge, grand marble staircases, a museum-style hallway with artifact displays, and an executive lounge with red velvet seating. The setting features high-end interior design mixing modern and traditional Japanese architectural elements.

agents.ego_description: walking through an upscale lounge area with wooden floors and indoor bamboo garden dividers

person leaning against railing looking at phone

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an upscale indoor lounge featuring dark wooden floors and large bamboo planters that divide the space. The character walks forward through the area, passing by a few scattered NPCs including a woman in red near a large arched window at the far end. The lighting mixes warm artificial sources with natural light filtering through the ornate windows.

events.description: enters darker corridor with 'Japan' exhibition signage on the wall
begins ascending the grand marble staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through a corridor past exhibition signage and ascending a wide marble staircase with ornate railings

large vibrant painting with green and pink abstract forms
wide staircase with dark marble steps and ornate black metal railing

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open lounge into a narrower, darker corridor featuring a 'Japan' exhibition sign and colorful abstract artwork. The space then opens into a grand stairwell with dark marble floors and ornate metal railings, which the character begins to ascend.

agents.ego_description: continuing up the marble staircase toward the upper floor landing

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the grand staircase, reaching an upper landing with marble floors and potted trees. Natural light filters through arched windows as the character approaches the entrance to a long hallway featuring red carpet and museum-style display cases.

scene_state.functional_zone: museum corridor with artifact displays and security

events.description: opens double doors and enters the executive lounge room

agents.ego_description: walking down a long corridor past illuminated artifact displays and stationary security guards

decorative wall-mounted light fixture with warm glow

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a long, elegant hallway with red carpet and dark ornate walls lined with illuminated artifact display cases. A security guard stands at attention on the right side. The character proceeds to the end of the corridor and opens double doors to enter a lounge area.

scene_state.functional_zone: executive lounge with seating and city views

agents.ego_description: walking around the lounge, examining the furniture and looking out the window at the city view

entered.detail: long curved sofa with red velvet upholstery and orange cushions
decorative wooden room divider with geometric lattice pattern
large rectangular pendant light with wooden lattice shade
tall window with roller blind overlooking city street

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious executive lounge featuring red velvet sofas, wooden lattice room dividers, and large windows overlooking the city. The character explores the room, walking past a seated woman reading on a sofa, and pauses at a large window to look outside before continuing to explore the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an upscale Japanese-themed exhibition space that transitions from a bamboo-filled lounge into a grand architectural interior and finally into a private executive suite. It begins by moving through an open lounge with dark wooden floors and bamboo planters, passing a woman in red near a large arched window. As the character leaves the open area, the scene shifts into a narrower corridor marked by exhibition signage and abstract art before expanding into a grand stairwell with dark marble floors and ornate railings. The camera then ascends to an upper landing and proceeds down a long, elegant hallway lined with red carpets and illuminated artifact displays, passing a security guard on the way to a set of double doors. Finally, the movement culminates as the character enters a spacious executive lounge characterized by red velvet sofas and wooden lattice dividers, pausing at a large window to overlook the city.
